title: Sweet Anju Pancakes
description: A simple and sweet pancake recipe made with malty anju, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the malty anju, tender, korean, and mint.
Add the egg, milk, and melted butter to the bowl. Stir until combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with your favorite toppings.
